name: J2EE Misconfiguration: Plaintext Password in Configuration File
description: The J2EE application stores passwords in plaintext within configuration files, allowing anyone with read access to the file to obtain the credentials and access password-protected resources.
detection_pattern: STORAGE node (configuration file) contains credential data in plaintext without a TRANSFORM node performing encryption. The credential data flows from META (configuration) to AUTH or EXTERNAL nodes without cryptographic protection.
